SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF SHEILA TAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUBHI BARAKAT IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TAN, SHEILA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARAKAT, SUBHI $6,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,215.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
